bird.name: 皇家企鵝
bird.summary: 白颊黄眉企鹅（台湾作皇家企鵝，学名：Eudyptes schlegeli）是企鹅的一种，棲息於近南极的麦夸里岛與邻近岛屿上。国际自然保护联盟(IUCN) 将白颊黄眉企鹅归类为近危物種。此学名是为了纪念德国动物学家，赫尔曼·施莱格尔所取的。 外觀 关于白颊黄眉企鹅是否為长眉企鹅的…

relations.subject: 皇家企鵝
relations.evidence: Before hunting started, there were three million penguins on the island (both royal and king). Modern threats to the royal penguin include introduced predators such as rats (and formerly cats but they were eradicated from Macquarie Island recently), discarded plastic, pollution, and decreased food supply due to commercial fishing
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
